evidence_summary: Operator has a draft ModSec exclusion rule written by a colleague and asks curator to review it for correctness. The review task is evaluating an existing rule, not authoring a new one. The existing rule has a regex that over-matches legitimate Magento admin paths.
rationale: Reviewing an existing rule for over-matching is a FP adjudication task — the rule itself is generating false positives on legitimate traffic. Correct routing: gating-false-positives to evaluate the rule's FP risk. prescribing-defensive-payloads applies when authoring a net-new rule.
